# #10203 — multi-turn on-device chat soak: app -> host agent -> response, x4, verifying the agent stays alive.

turn 1: response rendered=true | agent health="running" | msgs=8
turn 2: response rendered=true | agent health="running" | msgs=10
turn 3: response rendered=true | agent health="running" | msgs=12
turn 4: response rendered=true | agent health="running" | msgs=14

app pid before soak: 4110 ; after soak: 4110 (same pid = app never crashed)
